title: Show HN: a2web — adaptive web fetching for AI agents
author: denis
text:
One fetch(url) call runs a tier cascade and returns the best content.

Curious for feedback.

children.author: alice
children.text:
Top-level comment from alice.

Nice idea, but how does it handle Reddit?

children.author: denis
children.text: The Reddit handler hits .json?limit=500 and renders the full tree.
